meta.title: How to make A.I. Album Covers
meta.description:
Hey there! In this super entertaining video, I'm going to show you how to have a fantastic time with artificial intelligence while creating some awesome album covers.

Get ready to let loose your creativity and have a marvelous experience with these exciting tools I'll be using:

Midjourney: 
https://www.midjourney.com/

Dall-e 2:
https://openai.com/product/dall-e-2

Clip Interrogators:
https://replicate.com/pharmapsychotic/clip-interrogator
https://huggingface.co/spaces/fffiloni/CLIP-Interrogator-2
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
00:00 Intro
00:25 Record Cover history
00:48 Alex Steinweiss
01:25 Jim FLora
01:58 A.I. text to images
03:40 Image to text
05:30 A.I. Fujita
06:37 A.I. Photos album Covers
09:00 More A.I. Covers 
10:50 Outro
